business_ideas.idea: Ghost.org: open-source Substack competitor with lower take-rate and transparent financials
IKEA hacking Instagram account plus courses, kits, and product guides for DIY furniture enthusiasts
Professional networking platform built specifically for teachers, not generic LinkedIn
Personal finance course teaching tax strategies used by wealthy people

predictions.text: Ghost will become multi-hundred million dollar company; it follows successful curve similar to ConvertKit
Niche platforms beat generic ones; vertical LinkedIn for teachers, nurses will work better than regular LinkedIn
